data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T08:40 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

? skogtown-wisp-wisp-0rlgv [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

content.thinking:
All children of this patrol wisp are already closed (✓). This means the previous patrol cycle completed all steps. I need to squash this wisp and create a new patrol.

Let me check `bd mol current` to confirm there's no remaining step.

content.text: All steps in this patrol wisp are already complete. Squashing and starting a fresh patrol cycle.

input.command: gt mol squash --jitter 10s --summary "Previous patrol cycle already completed - all steps closed"
